limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI spend, headcount, or named vendor/infrastructure partnerships disclosed in the excerpts; only generic acknowledgment of ongoing R&D and incorporation of AI in operations.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases are referenced ('certain parts of our business operations') but no specific named initiatives, deployment details, or metrics are provided; scored 3 for named but unspecified deployment.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section and business-section material both present; risk scenarios are company-specific (legal/regulatory action, reputational harm, cybersecurity intensification) with described mechanisms, but no quantification or named governance bodies, capping at 4.
